---
title: "Citation"
---

## How to Cite

Prudencio, D., Balmori de la Miyar, J. R., Silverio-Murillo, A., & Sobrino, F. (2024). Examining COVID-19's disruptive effect on education in Mexican universities. *International Journal of Educational Development*, 103144. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ijedudev.2024.103144

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@article{prudencio2024covid,
  author  = {Prudencio, Daniel and Balmori de la Miyar, Jose Roberto and
             Silverio-Murillo, Adan and Sobrino, Fernanda},
  title   = {Examining {COVID-19}'s Disruptive Effect on Education in {Mexican} Universities},
  journal = {International Journal of Educational Development},
  year    = {2024},
  pages   = {103144},
  doi     = {10.1016/j.ijedudev.2024.103144}
}
```

## Data Availability

The underlying administrative data are collected and reported by the **National Association of Universities and Institutions of Higher Education (ANUIES)** and are publicly available through the ANUIES statistical portal.

## About This Website

This summary was built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org) and hosted on GitHub Pages. It presents the paper's methods and findings for a general academic audience.
